## 🛒 Shopping Cart Feature - Orders Management

### Description
Implement a shopping cart system for the Gulfseries service booking platform to allow users to manage service selections before checkout.

### Features
- ✅ Add services to cart
- ✅ View cart items with details (service name, price, quantity)
- ✅ Update quantities and remove items
- ✅ Persistent cart storage (localStorage/database)
- ✅ Real-time cart total calculation
- ✅ Proceed to checkout/booking confirmation

### Tasks
- [ ] Design cart data structure
- [ ] Create cart component/UI
- [ ] Implement add/remove/update functionality
- [ ] Add cart persistence
- [ ] Create cart summary display
- [ ] Implement checkout flow
- [ ] Add responsive design for mobile/desktop
- [ ] Write tests for cart functionality

### Related Documentation
See [Shopping Cart Requirements](https://github.com/bizmorgan244-lgtm/Gulfseries/blob/main/docs/shopping-cart-requirements.md) for detailed specifications.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Users can add services to cart
- [ ] Users can view all items in cart
- [ ] Users can update quantities
- [ ] Users can remove items
- [ ] Cart data persists across sessions
- [ ] Cart total calculation is accurate
- [ ] UI is responsive and user-friendly
- [ ] All tests pass

### Priority
High - Core feature for service booking platform
